  en: Thanks for contributing! Please fill in the sections below.

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type

<!-- fix / feat / refactor / docs / chore / test / perf -->

## Checklist

- [ ] All existing tests are green (`dotnet test`)
- [ ] New tests added for new behaviour (test-first / TDD — red before green)
- [ ] `TreatWarningsAsErrors=true` build is clean — no warnings
- [ ] Bilingual (`hu:` / `en:`) XML docs on new public members
- [ ] Naming conventions followed (`T` / `I` / `A` / `F`)
- [ ] Blank lines around control structures
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and typed (`fix:`, `feat:`, `refactor:`, ...)
- [ ] No design-invariant violations (no shared memory, let-it-crash, location transparency, capability = reference)

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should focus on, trade-offs, follow-up work. -->
